updates.note: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari announced the formation of a high-level inquiry commission, headed by retired Justice Samapti Chatterjee, to investigate alleged atrocities against women and children during the previous TMC regime. Senior IPS officer Damayanti Sen has been appointed as the commission's member-secretary to investigate key cases, including Sandeshkhali, Bogtui, and Kasba.

Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari announced the reopening of the RG Kar case and suspended three IPS officers—Vineet Goyal, Abhishek Gupta, and Indira Mukherjee—for alleged lapses and misconduct during the investigation. Departmental proceedings have been initiated to probe their roles in the handling of the case.
